name: altis/skeleton
description: A base Altis project to get started with

ignore.PKSA-4t1p-xpk2-nsss: CloudFront Policy Document Injection in Aws\CloudFront\Signer. Altis does not use CloudFront URL/cookie signing - only CloudFrontClient::createInvalidation is called for cache purging.
ignore.PKSA-dxyf-6n16-t87m: S3 Encryption Client Key Commitment in Aws\S3\Crypto\S3EncryptionClient*. Altis does not use S3 client-side encryption - humanmade/s3-uploads uses only the plain S3Client.
